honest_status: Not a hooks/*.sh unit (schema hooks[] pattern disallows the scripts/ path prefix — see adapters/claude-code/scripts/waiver-density.sh, invoked directly by session-start-digest.sh's feed_waiver_density() via a full relative path, and by scripts/harness-kpis.sh (E.5) in --report mode). kind:pattern with an empty hooks[] mirrors the E.7 session-resumer.sh fragment's precedent for the same scripts/-not-hooks/ situation.
